prompt: HEK293-based synthetic immune sensor: CD19-scFv–CD3ζ synNotch receptor activates tTA upon antigen binding; tTA drives constitutive IL-12 secretion and a safety kill-switch iCasp9 under rapamycin-inducible FKBP dimerizer
reason: Complex mammalian synbio: receptor + TF cascade + payload + kill-switch. Tests layered topology.

prompt: Formate-assimilation pathway for CO2 fixation in E. coli: FDH1 converts CO2 to formate, FtfL-Fch-FolD-MtdA convert formate to methylene-THF, Gcv cleaves glycine; all driven by PgapA with RBS library optimization for flux balance
reason: Long enzymatic cascade, tests metabolic topology reasoning.

prompt: Blue-light inducible gene expression: EL222 transcription factor (blue-light-activated) drives Plac-EL222 hybrid promoter controlling mCherry; dark-state represses, 470nm light activates within 60s
reason: Optogenetic — visually and temporally interesting demo.

prompt: Dual-feedback delayed oscillator in E. coli: araC activates pBAD which drives LacI and LuxI; LacI represses pLac driving AraC (negative loop); LuxI produces AHL which activates LuxR→pLuxR→GFP reporter; tunable period via ssrA degradation tags
reason: Classic Elowitz-style oscillator with QS reporter; visually striking topology.

prompt: Arsenic biosensor for drinking water: ArsR repressor binds ArsO operator in the absence of arsenic, derepresses on As(III) binding; ArsR regulates PArs driving colored output via amilCP chromoprotein (naked-eye readout)
reason: Real-world application (water testing), simple elegant topology.

prompt: Three-input AND gate for pathogen detection: outputs sfGFP only when all three inputs present — AHL (LuxR-activated pLuxR), IPTG (lactose repressor LacI removal on pLac), and aTc (TetR removal on pTet) — via tandem promoter cascade with T7 polymerase split into N/C halves that reconstitute on presence of intein-joining helper
reason: Hard multi-input logic; uses split-T7 + intein (advanced biology).

prompt: Anti-inflammatory probiotic for IBD: butyrate-responsive promoter Pbuk senses gut inflammation (low butyrate), activates secreted IL-10 cytokine (via OmpA secretion signal) and anti-TNF nanobody (OmpA-tagged); switches off when butyrate restored — senses and self-limits
reason: Living therapeutic; combines sensing + protein secretion + self-limitation.

prompt: Single-use recombinase memory circuit: Bxb1 integrase (constitutive under pJ23100) flips an inverted pTet cassette once on aTc induction, permanently turning on downstream RFP — no reversibility without excisionase gp47; acts as 1-bit write-once genetic memory
reason: Epigenetic-style permanent switching; unique circuit class.

prompt: Drought-responsive Arabidopsis reporter: DREB2A transcription factor under the rd29A stress-promoter activates a DRE-containing synthetic promoter driving luciferase; provides quantitative, real-time luminescence readout of water stress in field conditions

Paper-based cell-free Zika RNA diagnostic: toehold switch with 30-nt trigger region complementary to Zika NS5 mRNA; in presence of Zika RNA the hairpin opens, exposing RBS for LacZ-alpha production; colorimetric readout via X-gal on paper substrate
